base_url.description: Fleetio API root. Defaults to https://secure.fleetio.com/api/v1. Also usable as a base URL override for tests/proxies.

api_key.description: Fleetio API key. Sent as Authorization: Token <api_key>.

account_token.description: Fleetio account token. Sent as the Account-Token request header on every request.

page_size.description: Number of records requested per page (per_page). Between 1 and 100.
